history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, messy hair and white-rimmed sunglasses stands in front of a wall decorated with various vintage-style signs and logos. He is wearing a black t-shirt with a graphic print of a skeleton riding a motorcycle, a silver chain necklace, a white zip-up hoodie, and black pants with embroidered designs on the knees. His sneakers are black and white.

The background is a textured, greyish wall covered in an eclectic mix of items. To the left, there's a bright red "EXIT" sign with neon pink lettering. Below it, several circular and rectangular signs are visible, including a yellow can-like sign with "GUI" and "SUPR MOTO" text, and a circular white and red logo with text that appears to be "POLO". Further to the right, framed pictures and license plates are mounted, one prominently displaying "PATROL". A large, vertical blue and white sign with "Mobi" in large letters is on the far right, with "TIRES" written above it. Other smaller logos and graphics are scattered across the wall, creating a busy, retro, and somewhat urban aesthetic.

The lighting is somewhat dim and moody, with a spotlight or overhead light casting shadows and highlighting the textures of the wall and the subject. The color palette is dominated by the grey of the wall, the black and white of the subject's clothing, and the vibrant reds, blues, and yellows of the signs. The overall mood is cool, stylish, and slightly rebellious, with a strong emphasis on a vintage automotive and urban culture theme.
